arts.ttl: 33-goal striker known for his role in Liverpool’s Champions League win vs Barcelona linked with move to Leeds – report
arts.sum: Leeds United continue to look to bolster their squad in the January transfer window as they maintain their strong position at the top of the Championship. The latest move sees the club take Liverpool academy forward Oakley Cannonier on trial at their Thorp Arch training ground, according to a report from The Athletic. arts.ttl: Chiesa Pledges Future to Liverpool: “I Want to Be Here”
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has made his intentions clear, squashing rumors of a potential move away from Liverpool. The Italian winger's commitment comes amid speculation linking him with a return to Serie A, particularly with Napoli showing interest following Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's departure to Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: Liverpool seal £84m windfall thanks to FSG bargaining behind the scenes
Race discrimination claim against Liverpool thrown out by tribunal
arts.athr: Hannah Al-Othman, North of England correspondent
arts.sum: Asad Farooq unsuccessfully applied for first-team support role Club argues ‘no evidence that race played any part’ A man who had claimed that Liverpool Football Club had unlawfully discriminated against him because of his race has had his claim thrown out by an employment tribunal. Asad Farooq had applied for a job as a first-team operations officer in November 2022. The “high-pressure” role involved supporting the team in their day-to-day activities. Continue reading...
